text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One night, while I'm organizing some files in my
office...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer? Do you have a moment?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I was hoping to borrow you for a bit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember at the end of summer camp
how I said there was something I wanted to do?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I... I want to issue a challenge to someone. Could
you come with me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober leads us through the campus until
we finally meet...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You're already here.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes. I came a bit early to watch the sunset.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Now then...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What is it you wished to say to me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove, I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to thank you for everything you've done
for me up until now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You've guided me through so much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
When I had just entered Tracen and was too
flustered by the male teachers, you were the one
to help me study...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And when I was worried about the differences
between myself and other Mejiros like McQueen
and Ryan, you were the one to give me an ideal
to chase after.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You came to watch my debut race and reassured
me when I was overcome with fear before the
Japanese Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You knocked some sense into me when I felt as if
I was going to lose the battle against myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove, I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm going to become "Mejiro Dober."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Even if I have people I admire, I'm not going to
compare myself to them. I'm going to become a
unique light in this world like none other.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: So...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Will you please accept this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she says this, Mejiro Dober holds out a single
flower to Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course... I would be glad to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With a smile, Air Groove reaches out...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And accepts the yellow carnation from Mejiro
Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
In the language of flowers, yellow carnations
mean "jealousy." Usually, people avoid using such
a message...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But there are some among us who purposefully
choose to gift this flower to others.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
For example, to their incredible and
accomplished mother...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Or to a role model we admire. With that gift we
declare...

text_block_list.name: Dober and Groove
text_block_list.text: I will surpass you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I see you remembered.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I haven't forgotten a single thing you've taught
me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: After all, I idolize you. You are my ideal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Which means you are also the person I want to
surpass the most!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to surpass you, Air Groove, and create
my own path as Mejiro Dober!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'll be waiting for you at the Queen Elizabeth II
Cup.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...What a remarkable challenge that was.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm so relieved she accepted it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thanks for accompanying me, Trainer.
choice_data_list: No problem, but why did you want me there?
No problem, but why did you want me there?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? Isn't it obvious?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I mean...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You've guided me through a lot too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to declare my intentions for the future in
front of both you and Air Groove today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove understood that. That's why she didn't
say anything even when she noticed you standing
there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Haha! What are you thanking me for? You're so
weird!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I will never forget her face at that moment,
shining in the light of the setting sun...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The preliminary to the Queen Elizabeth II Cup,
the Fuchu Umamusume Stakes, is right around the
corner!
